## gst jwt decode

Decodes a JWT and displays its header and payload claims

### Synopsis

Decodes a JWT (without signature verification) and pretty-prints its header and payload.

```
gst jwt decode [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help           help for decode
  -t, --token string   The JWT to decode. Reads from stdin when not provided.
```
